sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the yellow center to select it
print("=== Clicking on yellow center ===")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 24}])

lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== After clicking yellow center ===")
for r in range(18, 24):
    row_str = lines[r][0:32]
    if 'YY' in row_str:
        print(f"Row {r}: {row_str}")

# Check if anything changed
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed', False)}")

# Now let me try moving with directional keys
print("\n=== Trying RIGHT to move yellow center ===")
action(['RIGHT'])

lines_after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("After RIGHT:")
for r in range(18, 24):
    row_str = lines_after[r][0:32]
    if 'YY' in row_str:
        print(f"Row {r}: {row_str}")

# Also check green center
for r in range(38, 44):
    row_str = lines_after[r][0:32]
    if 'NN' in row_str:
        print(f"Green center at row {r}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
